title: Broccoli soup – something decadent for the cold

seo.title: Broccoli soup - something decadent for the cold - Marinda Kook

html:
It's as if the cold cuts right into your bones. So what better way to warm up from the inside. The soup is really easy and quick to make. Which cheese you crumble on top is up to you.

 

YOU NEED:

  • 1 onion
  • 2 cups broccoli
  • 60 ml butter
  • 1,5 litre stock ( I used 2 stock cubes and mixed them with 1,5 litre boiling water)
  • 2,5 ml nutmeg
  • salt and pepper to taste
  • 250 ml cream
  • 1 wedge blue cheese or cheddar or feta ( depends what you like)

NOW:

  1. slice the onion into rings and fry in the butter
  2. rinse your broccoli and break it into smaller pieces – stir-fry it briefly together with the onions
  3. dissolve the stock cubes in the hot water and pour over the broccoli
  4. let it just steam until tender – not mushy
  5. season with nutmeg, salt and pepper
  6. puree it in a food processor or with a stick blender
  7. pour back into the pot and stir the cream through

When you serve it, crumble your cheese of choice over and enjoy it with a slice of warm bread.
